title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sasken Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sasken Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sasken Technologies:
Sasken Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies!
